projectDescription: A bilingual (English/Traditional Chinese) single-page wedding invitation website for Johnny & Josephine with an integrated RSVP form that collects guest responses and stores them in Google Sheets via Google Apps Script.
keyFeatures: Integrated RSVP form with real-time validation
Google Sheets backend via Google Apps Script
Automatic email notifications for guests and couple
Live countdown timer to wedding date
Photo gallery with lightbox and swipe-to-close on mobile
Dynamic form fields (vegetarian meals, children seats, paper invitation with address)
Confetti animation on successful RSVP submission
Parking information modal with detailed map
publicApiSurface: doGet(e) — Google Apps Script web app GET handler
doPost(request) — Google Apps Script web app POST handler that processes RSVP submissions
handleRequest(request) — Core RSVP data handler; writes row to Google Sheet and sends emails
sendEmail(data) — Sends HTML confirmation email to guest and notification to couple
initializeSheet() — Sets up Google Sheet with headers, validation, and formatting
getRSVPStats() — Returns attendance totals and guest count from the sheet
openParkingModal() / closeParkingModal() — Controls the parking info lightbox
triggerConfetti() — Celebrates successful RSVP with a confetti animation
